title: Urospathella wurdackii
taxonomy: Urospathella wurdackii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Urospathella. This plant is native to South America and is part of the larger Melastomataceae family, which consists of over 5,000 species. The Melastomataceae family is a diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the "membracaceous family." Urospathella wurdackii's classification places it within this family, indicating its evolutionary relationships with other Melastomataceae species.
parts: Urospathella wurdackii is a plant species native to South America, but unfortunately, there is limited information available about its medicinal properties and parts. However, some plants within the same family as Urospathella wurdackii have been studied for their medicinal properties. It is essential to note that more research is needed to confirm the medicinal properties of Urospathella wurdackii.
